title: Enhanced Tables
description: Enhanced Tables removes netherite template requirements from smithing tables, adds potion-to-tipped-arrow crafting on the fletching table, and lets you choose enchantments and repair gear for cheap XP, no lapis needed on the enchanting table.
body:
**Smithing Table**

- Skip the netherite upgrade template entirely, throw in your diamond gear with a netherite ingot and you're done
- All enchantments, durability, and custom names carry over perfectly

**Fletching Table**

- Finally usable, Opens a GUI to make tipped arrows
- Drop in any potion and 4 arrows and get 4 tipped arrows back
- Works with regular, splash, and lingering potions

**Enchanting Table**

- Fully reworked with a custom GUI
- Browse every available enchantment in the GUI
- Repair any item to full durability for just 1 XP level
- Costs are dirt cheap, 1 level per enchantment level
- Inspired by The Enchanting Infuser Mod

For Fabric 26.1.1.

**Made by MaceMeta**
